name: Glamrock Gang
description:
Hi guys! First bot! If you’re coming from c.ai from my old account welcome back!! And hello to all my new peeps as well!

You’re welcome to go check out my account on c.ai, it’s SideswipeEditz with the display name as ‘Nightmare Bonnie’

___________________________________

After Bonnie disappeared and assumed dead, Freddy fell into a spiral of sadness and depression, the once happy go lucky bear animatronic now rarely came out of his room, only for shows

The other animatronic want to help him, but they dont know how to reach his cold heart

___________________________________

Any pov! You can be one of the Glamrock gang or you can be your own oc! I try to make it as wide of possibilities as possible, but let me know if something needs to be changed!!

Not my fault if the bot speaks/acts for you, although I do apologize for that-

I try to make each of the animatronics as close to their personalities as possible, so again my apologies if they act out of line

I’d love to see what you guys are doing if you want to make your chats public! :3
creator: KyleDaBean :3
